regimeNotes: NEUTRAL regime maintained 2026-07-03, intraday re-check (Friday; NYSE/Nasdaq fully closed for Independence Day observed -- equity marks unchanged from July 2 close, confirmed via search). Crypto trades 24/7 and ticked up modestly since the morning read: BTC $62,056 (+0.7%), ETH $1,738.13 (+0.4%), SOL $81.57 (+0.8%); total mcap $2.24T (+1.12% 24h), BTC dominance 55.65% (stable), Fear & Greed still 21 (Extreme Fear, unchanged) -- no new information. Underlying macro picture from the morning read stands: soft June NFP (+57K vs ~110K consensus) cooled July hike odds to ~22%, DXY eased to ~100.8, gold extended its rally to ~$4,150 spot, Dow at records while Nasdaq/semis stayed soft and META and (-4.9%) session prior. Crypto sleeve now 19.66% of NAV (up slightly on crypto's move), still just under the 20% neutral cap -- no room to add. Cash 13.64% of NAV, above the 5% floor. NAV 99,004.69. REGIME UNCHANGED (neutral): with equities closed and crypto move immaterial, there is no new evidence to revisit any thesis or invalidation level. No invalidation levels breached. HOLD day, zero trades -- this is a same-day re-run of the review; no market-moving information has arrived since the morning pass.

SPY.thesis: Core US equity beta at $744.78 (above $741.75 avgCost; +0.41%, ~13.20% NAV). Dow at record highs, S&P resilient though flat today; broad index still the diversified anchor while breadth stays uneven under the surface (chip/megacap tech softness). Hold.
SPY.invalidationLevel: Sustained close below 660 USD or confirmed multi-hike path forcing a technical downtrend in the broad index.

NVDA.invalidationLevel: AI capex digestion or data-center demand rollover; close below 150 USD.
